prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, using the current price of $676.70. Historical data from the past year was used to estimate the annualized drift (mean of daily log returns multiplied by 252) at approximately 35.3% and annualized volatility (standard deviation of daily log returns multiplied by sqrt(252)) at approximately 17.9%. The point estimate is the expected value of the log-normal distribution, and confidence intervals are derived from the standard deviation of the log returns over the 22-day period, adjusted for the drift.
